studio-lumiere.name: Studio Lumière
studio-lumiere.tagline: Brand identity and type design · Paris / Bengaluru
studio-lumiere.about: We're a two-person studio building identities for culture-shaping companies. Work ranges from brand systems to custom type families.

offerings.title: Brand identity · full
offerings.description: Logo system, type, color palette, guidelines document. Includes 2 rounds of revisions and 8 weeks of post-launch support.

offerings.title: Landing page design
offerings.description: Single high-conversion page. Wireframes to production-ready React or HTML. Figma file included.

offerings.title: Custom type design
offerings.description: Single weight typeface, tailored for your brand voice. Licensing included for 10 years.

offerings.title: Consultation hour
offerings.description: One hour with a senior designer. Strategy, critique, or direction.

testimonials.quote: Studio Lumière turned our brand from forgettable to magnetic. Six months later, we still hear 'great logo' in investor meetings.
testimonials.name: Vikram Kothari

testimonials.quote: They push back. On the best ideas, and on the lazy ones. That's what we needed.
testimonials.name: Priya Nair

rhea-yoga.name: Rhea Yoga
rhea-yoga.tagline: Weekly classes and retreats · Koramangala, Bengaluru
rhea-yoga.about: Small-group yoga, breathwork, and mindfulness classes. Led by Rhea Menon, E-RYT 500.

offerings.title: Monthly unlimited
offerings.description: All classes, all levels. Pause anytime.

offerings.title: 10-class pack
offerings.description: Use within 90 days. Sharable between two people.

offerings.title: Private session
offerings.description: One-on-one, tailored to your practice. Held at the studio or on Zoom.

offerings.title: Weekend retreat
offerings.description: 2 days · Coorg · all meals and stay included. Quarterly.

testimonials.quote: Rhea's classes changed how I move through a workday. And the teacher training was the best thing I did for myself last year.
testimonials.name: Ankita Desai
